_comment: Highest dependency versions our integration tests have passed against. Updated automatically by .github/workflows/dep-watch.yml when a newer version is released and the drift tests still pass. _known_bad lists versions to exclude even if they're newer than _last_tested — e.g. for upstream regressions.

_known_bad._comment: Versions to exclude from acceptable ranges. Add an entry when a regression is found; remove when upstream fixes.
